commit_message: AI-HANDOFF: PHYSICALOPERATINGADDRESSRESOLVER ready for ChatGPT review
commands_run: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|chrome|msedge|powershell|pwsh' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'bead-onboarding-form-validation|playwright|bootstrap|interactive|npm|tsx|run-interactive-watchdog' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CreationDate, CommandLine | Format-Table -Wrap
Inspected current ledger, scorecard, findings, mapping calibration, and saved Physical Operating Address probe/capture artifacts
Confirmed no scripts/physical-address-*.ts files exist; owning code is under fixtures/

tests_run.details: Regenerated calibration, scorecard, and findings. Coverage remained 7/277 (3%), grade D; findings remained product 0, ambiguous 4, mapping-blocked 0, ready-for-rerun 0.
Refreshed findings still report that the guarded post-toggle structure capture does not isolate field-local Physical Operating Address labels for business_mailing_*.

run_scope: Physical Operating Address non-live resolver/capture diagnosis

confirmed: 2. Capture bounds are too broad or too narrow
secondary: 8. Existing artifacts are stale relative to the new refinement and need a fresh guarded capture to validate the fix

key_outcome: This run tightened the Physical Operating Address post-toggle capture refinement and validated it with unit tests, but the refreshed non-live outputs still leave all four business_mailing concepts unresolved because the saved sanitized capture lacks field-local labels.
blockers: The saved sanitized post-toggle capture still exposes generic controls instead of field-local Address Line 1 / City / State / ZIP labels.
Without fresh field-local capture evidence, geometry-only assignment remains unsafe for business_mailing_*.
A fresh guarded non-finalizing Physical Operating Address capture is required to validate the new refinement against the signer DOM.
uncertainty: The new refinement removes the known spillover modes, but this strictly non-live run cannot prove whether the live DOM contains recoverable field-local labels after the fix.
If a fresh guarded capture still shows only generic controls, the remaining blocker is likely DOM label proof rather than bounds drift.
next_recommendation: Run one fresh guarded non-finalizing Physical Operating Address post-toggle capture using the tightened refinement and inspect whether the sanitized artifact now exposes field-local Address Line 1, City, State, and ZIP labels.
